reviews.review_text: Our favourite place, fantastic location right next to the beach, we stayed in the Swiss chalet very clean and cosy a little dated but so comfortable, self contained so everything there to cook up a feast. Then walk to the beach for the sunset...  Bliss
Beautiful caravan park. Clean amenities and lovely staff. Would definitely stay again. Highly recommend.

We have been to Bussleton many times over the years and this was our first time to Sandy Bay, highly recommend this place. Superb location and I cannot get over how clean the chalet was, absolutely immaculate! So cosy with the log fire in the winter! We will be returning for sure! Thank you so much Sandy Bay! 🤩

Lovely chalets, clean, comfortable with a beautiful outlook from the back patio. Will definitely return soon. Perfect location and dog friendly which is a bonus. My little dog Baxter didn’t want to leave 😂🐶
Clean chalets, dog friendly, and right on the beach is a bonus.

We had such a wonderful stay at Sandy Bay! A beautiful campground that my husband said was his favourite so far. The grounds are so clean and well looked after. My kids loved the large chess board and spent most of the time at the playground. Everyone was so lovely and the location was amazing. Thank you for a fantastic stay, we will be back!

The campsite is in  great location and right next to the beach . Which is great for a morning swim and a sunset picnic.|The campsite itself is well maintained and has some great spots for tents and campers , The staff are friendly and  we took our dog , which she loved it also.||I have been back several times and will definitely be back again . Great spot and the locals are friendly and welcoming which is another added plus.

The cabins may be nice and well-equipped, but I wouldn’t recommend this place if you’re staying in your car or camping. There are no proper kitchen facilities — only a BBQ hot plate — and there’s no fridge available to store food or even a proper water tap. Overall, I feel it’s quite expensive for what is offered.
Powered site for our motorhome. Clean amenities. Nice BBQ area. All good. Bike track goes to Busselton Jetty. Bottle shop and little supermarket nearby
Fabulous location. Small park but great spot to be for the beach.

Lovely campsite that offers all types of accommodation from chalet to caravans and camping. Has a laid back vibe with plenty of facilities available. A stone's throw from the beach, and Busso is a 10 minute drive away with all kinds of shops and restaurants on offer.

Location: Excellent quiet location. Short stroll to dog beach. Short drive into Busselton. Cycle/walking paths close to the holiday park. |Chalet: We stayed in a Swiss Chalet; this was a good size for us with a small dog. The chalet was clean and well equipped. Our family members (travelling from UK) stayed in a mud brick chalet and they were happy with all aspects of their stay.  |Facilities: Grounds clean and tidy, with plenty of room for walking our dog on leash. The BBQ area is well maintained and clean. |Would recommend Sandy Bay Holiday Park for a short stay especially if you are travelling with a dog.

This chalet had everything we needed for a pleasant weekend including a full size fridge and stove, a good range of cooking utensils, an iron and ironing board. The chalet was very clean and comfortable, the area was nice and quiet and very close to the beach. A great location close to many attractions very suitable for couples or families and really good value. We will certainly stay again!

I loved everything about our four-night stay. The cabin was perfectly clean and comfortable, and had everything we needed. Being less than 100m to a glorious beach was wonderfully relaxing. It's close to restaurants and shops but far enough out of Busselton to feel miles away from anywhere. I didn't want to leave.

Our four-night stay was wonderfully happy and relaxed. The cabins are clean and comfortable, ours was less than a 100m walk to a beautiful, sheltered bay. The service was faultless, as was the entire stay.

We had a lovely stay over the weekend, in one of the rammed chalets. The chalet was great! Plenty of room for us. Nice & clean. The gardens & grounds are beautifully kept. Stones throw to the beach. Will definitely stay again 😊
great shady caravan park right on the water. Well kept yards and lawn showers and ablutions all good. They also have quite a few cabins that are ok.
Lovely quiet spot right on the beach
Best place in Busso.

Was a lovely little weekend stay at this boutique caravan park. Grounds and gardens were well maintained, ablutions were always clean and the camp kitchen well equipped. Just a few mintues walk to the beach which is also a dog beach so was perfect for your little pooch. With bushland between the beach and park it is nicely sheltered. Would definitely stay again.

Great locations and campsite lay out and amenities. Staff are very helpful and friendly and the campsite and facilities are always spotless.|Right next to the beach and a great little bar hidden away next door  .Re booked as soon as I left
Amaze balls.. one of the best parks! Beautiful setting.. right near the beach..awesome location!!! Great team... nice small park!!

Es war sehr klein und eng, wir waren froh, dass nicht noch weitere Campervans gekommen sind. Die Toiletten und auch die Campingküche sind etwas in die Jahre gekommen.

Für den Preis haben wir mehr erwartet.
Die Mitarbeiter waren sehr freundlich.

The first night I woke up busting for the toilet and it was locked. Having to hold it till the morning till they unlocked was very difficult. The next day I got the code to the male toilet. The only problem is I woke up busting for the toilet and got to the toilet and it's 2am and the pathetic old push button lock doesn't open when I put the code in. I was busting so bad and trying to open the pathetic old lock which after about 10 trya of putting in the exact code I was given I had to once again be locked out of the toilet again. I am just glad I didn't need to do a number 2 otherwise I would have just had to do it at the bathroom door. Instead I was forced to go back to my tent where they had also just turned on the sprinklers so holding it in wasn't possible anymore. With way to many guests there was no where to pee. Truely a 3rd world experience when it comes to their bathrooms being locked with locks so crappy they don't even open with the supplied code. So I had to walk out to the beach in the middle of the night just to find somewhere to pee before my bladder almost burst. I almost stepped on a baby smake on the beach path too. For the discomfort, danger and inconvenience it caused me I had no choice but to right a review to warn others bring your own toilet or suffer having no toilet access all night. What sort of a fool locks the bathroom at night so the guests cant use it? Then to have such a crappy old analogue push button lock that doesn't open even when you put the exact pin code in.
It was really a very bad thing to do to the guests.

It is a great place to relax and a starting point to explore the surrounding area. Sandy Bay is very close to the beach only a couple hundred meters. The park itself is set out nicely we had a great stay.

This holiday park has excellent facilities with plenty of trees and grass.The barbecues are clean and in good condition as well as the communal toilet and showers.The accommodation is chalets,caravans and a small area for tents.

Owners, caretakers very friendly and helpful.  Have stayed here twice with our little Yorkie dog.  Accommodation clean and everything we needed.  The grounds are well maintained.  The communal bbq area under shade, clean and great for meeting other travellers.  Short walk to beach and fishing spots.  Highly recommended.  Will stay again
A hidden gem. Exemplary chalets.  Spotless and well equipped.  Very helpful staff .
Stayed here for a work trip and ive never been to such a clean and tidy holiday park. Great location seconds from the beach and I didn't hear a sound from other guests. Highly recommended
Beautifully quiet & peaceful park. Clean amenities & the staff were very helpful. Close to beach & easy drive to town. Would recommend this Caravan park.
Very well maintained. Prettiest park in Oz
Clean and comfortable with everything you could need and thoughtful touches.

A Beautiful, Cozy Chalet Getaway
What a beautiful and cozy chalet to stay in, complete with a wood fire that kept us warm and added the perfect touch of comfort.

There were plenty of activities to enjoy during our stay — from a basketball hoop and giant chessboard to a playground that kept everyone entertained. It’s great for kids and adults! There’s also a BBQ in an undercover area, making it easy to enjoy meals outdoors no matter the weather.

I didn’t take any photos of the room, but it was absolutely stunning. Waking up and looking up at the high ceiling with its gorgeous wooden beams was such a peaceful way to start the day.

The location is ideal — close to the beach and just a short drive to the shops. A perfect spot for a relaxing and fun escape.
What a fantastic little place. Great value for a family of 5. Kids loved the proximity to the beach. I loved having. Fire…. Lovely little stay.

Had a Winter Get-away with my dog in a Swiss Chalets.
Phone them for a Great Price !!!
Fully equipped for comfortable stay and Dog Beach on doorstep of Park = PERFECT.

A great location. Lovely room Swiss chalet. Very comfortable with reverse cycle air-conditioning and wood burner heater. I highly recommend this property. Enjoyed a great stay with my 86 year old father.

An absolute gem to find tucked away on the bay. We stayed in the Swiss Chalet for one night but have already booked in to stay longer over the summer. The winter fireplace was the perfect touch to add warmth and character to the chalet. All the rooms were immaculately clean and tidy and there was everything you needed including firewood, crockery, linen and toiletry items. Looking forward to returning for a summer stay. Special thanks to Suzie at reception and Theo the Manager who were so kind and helpful!
The rammed earth cottages have a real wood fireplace!  Very pleasant on a winter eve!

Loved the fireplace in cabins, especially when we had a few days of bad rain.
Great location
Without a doubt the loveliest Park stay in the South West, Management are excellent,  Perfect location
Beautiful location, very clean and tidy facilities. We'll visit again in the future.

We stayed in a rammed earth chalet with our 5 children & 100% recommend. The staff were really accommodating, the chalet was clean, tidy and super cosy. It had everything we needed. The park grounds were well maintained and is such a beautiful place for the kids to play & adults to relax. 2 minute walk to the stunning beach! Will definitely be back.

We highly recommend staying here.
We had a great weekend in one of the rammed earth chalets. The friendly staff, neat and tidy chalet and location deserve 5/5.
We will be back for sure!

Stayed for 2 nights with young children. The outdoor space is beautiful and perfect for young children. Lots of space to play and good playground. It’s very peaceful to sit on the patio and get some fresh air and watch wildlife. The location is also fantastic, right next to the beach. We stayed in a Swiss chalet which had a lovely cosy cabin feel. Great size. I would just say the carpets need re-doing as they’re quite dated as are the bathrooms. We also struggled to get the wifi to work on the TV for streaming in the evening but we did use the DVD’s offered which was great.

The best campsite during our roadtrip through WA! Friendly staff, clean amenities and next to a beautiful beach with calm water. It was lovely to meet Theo&Nicole and their cute daughters, they were so helpful and made our stay! Would definitely come back :)
Beautiful gardens, beautifully clean

Unforgettable stay at Sandy Bay!
The park managers and staff are very friendly. They even helped us out with some fishing equipment and showed us how fishing is done. The park is very well located, only a minute walk to the beautiful beach. Facilities are clean and very well maintained. Highly recommend staying here!

Spent a wonderful 4 day break at Sandy Bay in a rammed earth chalet, my last night here today. I can absolutely highly recommend staying here. Chalet was wonderfully clean, cosy, beds so comfortable, self contained,  beautiful and peaceful with wonderful gardens, lush lawns, wildlife and peppermint trees. Waking up here was a delight, Geographe bay literally 150 metres away, magnificent spot to relax, swim or walk. I shall certainly come back here for a break.  Special thanks to all the Sandy Bay staff, Gina, Susie, Wendy and Nicole, all extremely friendly and helpful. Many thanks. Martin

An awesomely quiet place to stay, near the beach and the possums . Easy to access the rest of the South West of Western Australia. Great town of Busselton. Clean chalets with everything you need if you want to cook and relax .

Review of an Excellent Stay at a Clean and Well-Maintained Caravan Park

Overview

My recent stay at the caravan park was nothing short of exceptional. From the moment I arrived, I was impressed by the cleanliness and maintenance of the facilities. The park is designed to provide a serene and exclusive experience, with a limited number of sites that enhance privacy and comfort.

Cleanliness and Maintenance

One of the standout features of this caravan park is its impeccable cleanliness. The grounds are well-kept, with manicured lawns and tidy pathways that invite you to explore. The amenities, including restrooms and communal areas, are regularly cleaned and maintained, ensuring a pleasant environment for all guests. This attention to detail reflects the management’s commitment to providing a high-quality experience.

Helpful Staff

The staff at the caravan park were incredibly helpful throughout my stay. They greeted me warmly upon arrival and were always available to answer questions or provide assistance. Whether it was offering recommendations for local attractions or helping with any issues related to my accommodation, their friendly demeanor made me feel welcome and valued as a guest.

Accommodation Options

The majority of sites in the park consist of self-contained units or permanent caravans, which adds to the overall comfort of the stay. With only 9 shady caravan sites and 4 camping spots available, it creates an intimate atmosphere that feels exclusive compared to larger parks. This setup allows guests to enjoy their space without feeling crowded, making it ideal for families or individuals seeking a peaceful getaway.

Proximity to Beaches

One of the best aspects of this caravan park is its proximity to stunning beaches. Just a short 150-meter walk leads you to clean white sandy shores with turquoise waters. This easy access allows guests to enjoy beach activities such as swimming, sunbathing, or simply taking leisurely strolls along the coast. The combination of beautiful scenery and convenient access makes this location truly special.

Conclusion

Overall, my experience at this caravan park exceeded my expectations in every way. The cleanliness, helpful staff, exclusive accommodation options, and proximity to beautiful beaches create an ideal setting for relaxation and enjoyment. I would highly recommend this caravan park to anyone looking for a tranquil escape in nature while still enjoying modern comforts.
The place is perfect for explorers to enjoy and stay.
Great place for campers. Very friendly staff and very clean toillets&shower and campe kitchen! close to the beautiful beach.

J’ai séjourné il y a une semaine dans ce camping. Le camping en soit etait bien, toilettes douches et cuisine propres. A deux pas de la mer.
Les emplacements pour voiture/ caravanes sont très proches les uns des autres mais ça allait.
Cependant, quand j’ai appelé pour réserver on m’a demandé de payer par téléphone et de donner les numéros de ma carte bancaire. D’habitude méfiante mais n’ayant pas trop le choix je l’ai fais. Aujourd’hui donc, une semaine après plusieurs transactions sont sorties de mon compte et de nombreux achats sur internet ont été fait. Ce n’est peut être qu’une coïncidence, mais je trouve ça gros que ça arrive juste après avoir donné les numéros de ma carte.  Attention à vous

We camped here for a night. Loved it.  Most importantly dog friendly non school holidays
season. Facilities well maintained. Toilets and showers very very clean. Beach close by. Excellent experience.

Have just had another 8 nights with my husband and our dog in caravan.

Everything was perfect. Can't fault it. The park managers are lovely as are all staff. Very friendly and nothing is too much bother. Shout out to Omar who dropped everything to assist with bbq gas bottle replacement at breakfast.

We can't wait to return again soon.
Thanks everyone!

Loved our short stay here! The park is so clean and tidy, lush grass and the chalets were spotless!  We stayed in a rammed earth chalet and it had absolutely everything we needed. Such a fantastic location in a very quiet park. Will be back for sure!!

This park is a little gem.
Close to the beach, dog friendly,  the amenities are clean and tidy, and the staff are very friendly.
Well worth a visit.
Beautiful grounds…with awesome accommodation pet friendly and great service.

Spotless amenities, though we wished the van site had more shale and less sand. Very well maintained lawn areas, cabins looked nice. Pets are welcome but need to be controlled. Our GSD girl is not dog friendly so is always on leash "around company", yet some people let their dogs run loose which is annoying. I believe that on-leash applies at all times while in this park.
Amazing place for Family's
Everything is in great taste and in keeping with the building.
Realy good place the staff is realy nice and the bathroom is realy clean
A beautiful quiet place, near the beach ✔

Stayed in a two bedroom cabin. While of an older style, the cabin was very clean and tidy and fully stocked. Linens and beds lovely and comfy, and shampoo, conditioner, body wash and face shop supplied and great quality! Location is exceptional, the beach is second to none! Would stay again for sure!

We have just spent 4 nights in this Holiday Park. We had the most relaxing time. Accommodation was great, so close to the beautiful beach ⛱️ and some fishing. Our little dog Seamus loved it too.  We will be back. We have just recommended it to our neighboursand they are now looking at staying there  too. Thank you for a lovely stay.
We stayed in a chalet and it was a great stay.Could easily stay here for a week with kids without feeling like your living on top of each other. Standard amenities included , full kitchen with a/c
We had a powered site for our rooftop camper, perfect. Green lawns, basic camp kitchen but still handy. Very clean showers. Thanks

currently been here 3 days, 1 more to go, apartments are super clean, not an inch was/ is dirty, good facilities such as laundry block area to use and toilet and shower blocks if camping, and literly a 2-3 minute walk to the beach Amazing !! cant fault it, beautiful manicured grass areas and bbq areas all suoer clean too !, would love to come back

Management was very accommodating with our very late check in. The room was clean and fresh. The fireplace was prepared for an easy start.

Very close to the beach, great atmosphere we stayed in the chalets.
We stay here regularly.  Super friendly staff. Great spot. we ❤️ love  it. 😊 Thanks to the team. Ingo and Cirstin

Beautiful place, beautiful location, rooms are extremely well kept, we stayed in a rammed earth chalet so having a wood fire was lovely, however, there are possums, and lots of them, so if you are a light sleeper like myself expect to be awake most of the night listening to them run back and forth across the tin roof. Other than that you could not fault the place, would definitely recommend.
